title: Signal / event storm
symptoms: signalbus.emit fires a flood of callbacks in one frame
signal or event emit cascades into many handlers
broadcast triggers a chain of listeners synchronously
hitch from a burst of events processed in a single frame
mechanism: A signal or event is emitted that fans out to many subscribers (or cascades into further events), and all the handler work is processed synchronously within one frame.
diagnosis_hints: Check how many handlers run for the emitting signal in the hitch frame; look for an event that triggers a chain reaction.
typical_fixes: queue events and process a bounded number per frame
reduce the number of subscribers or make handlers cheaper
